## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Documentation improvement (no behavior change)
- [ ] New recipe / scenario in the skill
- [ ] New anti-pattern entry
- [ ] Tooling (CI, templates, linting)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened an issue first and discussed the approach (skip for typo / trivial fixes)
- [ ] My change is **project-agnostic** — no hard-coded paths, no app-specific labels
- [ ] I verified the agent still loads and uses the skill correctly after my change
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-facing
- [ ] Markdown passes `markdownlint` (or is consistent with the existing file)
